report_name: Alleged Iliad Italia Data Breach: Customer Data Reportedly for Sale on Dark Web

identities.name: Iliad Italia
identities.description: A major mobile and fixed-line telecommunications provider in Italy that was the alleged victim of a data breach, with its customer database reportedly put up for sale on a dark web forum.

identities.name: Iliad
identities.description: The French parent company of Iliad Italia, noted to have a history of security lapses and fines from data protection authorities.

infrastructure.name: Dark Web Forum
infrastructure.description: A dark web forum where a threat actor advertised a dataset for sale, allegedly containing customer data stolen from Iliad Italia.
